view.title: Validate persona scenario #3

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 3 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the expected outcome of the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires a deterministic validation of the scenario behavior regarding queue fairness, but there is no evidence provided that confirms whether the scenario was executed or what the actual outcomes were. The expected result states that the scenario behavior should be confirmed or produce a clear failure report, yet the evidence does not include any traces or snapshots that would allow for such validation. Therefore, the step is inconclusive due to a lack of supporting evidence.
